expected_labels.evidence_span: They accepted thousands of dollars but never really did anything
never really did anything towards my son's appeal, never really fought.
They never even really had meetings with me or my son.

review_text: I truly wonder if other Black people had great experiences here. They accepted thousands of dollars but never really did anything towards my son's appeal, never really fought. The case was transferred multiple times. They never even really had meetings with me or my son. Truly horrible.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I not only got my case handled but got more than expected out of it.
there were points where we didn't have contact for a while

deterministic_labels.matched_phrase: got more than expected out of it

review_text: My experience was really good with the law firm. I not only got my case handled but got more than expected out of it. The only reason I did not give 5 stars was because there were points where we didn't have contact for a while and I was unsure what was going on during that time.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I had to call three times over two weeks to get an answer

review_text: Paralegal Allison was very unhelpful. I had to call three times over two weeks to get an answer that took them less than 5 minutes.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Responses to questions are EXTREMELY slow.
Lack of communication on their end.

review_text: Responses to questions are EXTREMELY slow. The paralegals are not efficient. Lack of communication on their end. The lawyer was way better than the paralegals. Paralegals would receive zero stars.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Andrew called me a few days prior to my hearing
to discuss how things would go and what to expect
He was able to relay to the judge exactly what I intended.

review_text: Andrew called me a few days prior to my hearing to discuss how things would go and what to expect, and then again about 20 minutes before the hearing. I was glad to have an attorney to speak for me. He was able to relay to the judge exactly what I intended.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I was given guidance that ultimately cost me over $1,000 and wasn't fully explained.

review_text: I wasn't planning to leave a review, but after today I'm done. I hired Hoglund for a criminal matter. I was given guidance that ultimately cost me over $1,000 and wasn't fully explained. My case was delayed nearly five months, only to end in a plea deal that likely could have happened much earlier. I was contacted six months after my case was settled and told I still owed money.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Waited 2 years and only heard from them 2 or 3 times.

review_text: Lawyers and associate are not caring at all. Waited 2 years and only heard from them 2 or 3 times. Only heard from the actual attorney a day before the hearing. They didn't even get all my health information that they were supposed to.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Horrible appointment setup, phone tag, and no one seemed to know I had an appointment set up.
Had to repeat the same information many times to many different people
they're not even licensed in my state

deterministic_labels.matched_phrase: they're not even licensed in my state

review_text: Horrible appointment setup, phone tag, and no one seemed to know I had an appointment set up. Had to repeat the same information many times to many different people only to find out they're not even licensed in my state.

expected_labels.evidence_span: They failed me during my appeal
Multiple calls were canceled or no-showed
no attorney ever really reviewed my case or spoke to me

deterministic_labels.matched_phrase: no attorney ever really reviewed my case

review_text: Completely disappointed – do not trust this firm with your disability case. They failed me during my appeal. Multiple calls were canceled or no-showed, communication barriers made it impossible, and no attorney ever really reviewed my case or spoke to me.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I have not received any information about my case.
Whenever I call I get attitude.

review_text: Over two years and still waiting. I have not received any information about my case. Whenever I call I get attitude. They have no answers for why it is taking this long.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Outcome was great, disability approved.
messages were not returned sometimes for several days
I did not know who was representing me on the final hearing until 1-2 weeks before

review_text: Outcome was great, disability approved. Cons: I was never once offered a chance to meet anyone in person, messages were not returned sometimes for several days, and I did not know who was representing me on the final hearing until 1-2 weeks before. I always felt like a number, not a person.

expected_labels.evidence_span: promised charges were never filed
we were pushed into mediation and settlement we didn't want

review_text: I am a former client of SGS. Be prepared: this process is about money, not justice or principle. Through a wrongful death claim, promised charges were never filed, I uncovered critical pieces of evidence myself, and we were pushed into mediation and settlement we didn't want. Profit is number one.

expected_labels.evidence_span: always helped me with all my questions
In the end I received a fair settlement.

review_text: Kojo was very pleasant to work with, and always helped me with all my questions. Shannon Carey handled my auto accident case with grace and patience. In the end I received a fair settlement.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I knew I was dealing with professionals.
They answered all my questions and kept me informed

review_text: After being denied for SSD, I decided to hire Hoglund Law and from the very first day I knew I was dealing with professionals. They answered all my questions and kept me informed until the day I was approved.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I didn't know who was handling my case at times.

review_text: The hearing went very well. It sounded like you were prepared. The only problem for me was that I didn't know who was handling my case at times.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Thanksgiving and Christmas roll by and I heard nothing else from these guys.
I was told Chris got married ... but I should hear from someone at the end of the week. I did not hear from anyone.
I wish I didn't pay this lawfirm $600 to retain them.

review_text: Horrible communication and lack of follow through. Scheduled free consultation with Chris Proctor 9/25/25, retained him, and signed the client agreement. Filled out intake form and sent pertinent documents for my mom's estate. Had discovery phone call with paralegal Jaclyn. It seemed that they were attentive at first until I called a week later. I was told Chris got married which is he hasn't called but I should hear from someone at the end of the week. I didn't hear from anyone. I called back and left Chris and Jaclyn both a voicemail saying I wanted to know what is going on with the case or I might have to hire a different attorney. I got a voicemail from Jaclyn that the lawyers were working on my case and I should get the court documents soon. Thanksgiving and Christmas roll by and I heard nothing else from these guys. No phone call, no email, no letter, no telegraph, no smoke signal, nothing. I wish I didn't pay this lawfirm $600 to retain them. It was a mistake I consider a lesson learned. Never rely on Google ratings.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I had to call several times to check status. I even called my so call attorney in the beginning who did nothing to return my call.
But overall things are moving along more.

review_text: Sometimes there was uncertainty on whether anything was being worked on. I had to call several times to check status. I even called my so call attorney in the beginning who did nothing to return my call. But overall things are moving along more.

expected_labels.evidence_span: I have asked questions and get the same stupid answers.
I am still being told we have your account holders on board, which they do not.

review_text: I have asked questions and get the same stupid answers. My credit card companies are turning things over to collections. I am still being told we have your account holders on board, which they do not.

expected_labels.evidence_span: This company lies about their abilities and experience to get you to sign up with them.
They guaranteed that when lawsuits do happen they settle them for much less than owed.
Both of mine have been settled for far more than Century represented.

review_text: This company lies about their abilities and experience to get you to sign up with them. I was told they have relationships with creditors that mean clients rarely get sued. I was sued my first month in the program and have now been sued twice, all because of the steps they instructed me to take. They guaranteed that when lawsuits do happen they settle them for much less than owed. Both of mine have been settled for full amounts plus fees. Their agents tend to all tell you different things, and you don't get a dedicated representative that you can call directly, so getting reasonable updates and consistent information is nearly impossible. Just save yourself the headache and choose another firm.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Lauren takes the time to explain in detail
what to expect, how to handle the calls and what to do if we get served
The relief both financially and emotionally they gave us is worth more than I can express.

review_text: The entire staff has made us so at ease with any legal issue that arises from creditors. Lauren takes the time to explain in detail what to expect, how to handle the calls and what to do if we get served. The relief both financially and emotionally they gave us is worth more than I can express.

expected_labels.evidence_span: 3 years and $10,000 later all I got was a temporary order
they go for the minimum and don't even fight hard to get that

review_text: 3 years and $10,000 later all I got was a temporary order that's not in affect anymore. Not a good Father's right lawyer; they go for the minimum and don't even fight hard to get that. They lay back and get nothing done. I wouldn't recommend to anyone thanks Sara and Matthew for wasting my time and hard earned money.

expected_labels.evidence_span: The entire case was handed off without any clear indication of ongoing responsibility.
nor even basic responsiveness to my questions or concerns
without any clear indication of ongoing responsibility

review_text: I’m writing this review to share my honest and personal experience working with Ashoori Law regarding my EB-2 NIW petition. After signing the agreement and paying a significant portion of the legal fee, I was referred to a secondary attorney by Ashoori Law. From that point on, Ashoori Law took no further part in my case, neither oversight, support, nor even basic responsiveness to my questions or concerns. The entire case was handed off without any clear indication of ongoing responsibility. The referred attorney unfortunately did not complete the work thoroughly. Many key documents were missing or not attached to my petition, and several critical errors or omissions were never flagged or corrected. The responsiveness was also disappointing—at times it took several business days or longer to receive replies to simple questions. This caused significant delays, frustration, and stress during a time-sensitive immigration process.

expected_labels.evidence_span: Guiding me through the probate process with his calm demeanor, he conveyed that I was in good, steady hands
Options that worked best for my family were laid out carefully and compassionately.

review_text: I would like to offer my strongest recommendation and heartfelt gratitude for the services of Attorney Robert Jewett. Guiding me through the probate process with his calm demeanor, he conveyed that I was in good, steady hands through the entire legal process. He manages to strike a delicate balance of competence and compassion through what was a difficult, emotional and confusing time. Options that worked best for my particular situation were fully explained in email or over the phone if I wished. He offered straightforward pricing with no hidden surprises.

expected_labels.evidence_span: If you expect them to help you with Student Loan Discharge, you thought wrong.

review_text: If you expect them to help you with Student Loan Discharge, you thought wrong. They just want money from you and want you do all the work.
